fields.inlineHelpText:
IF(AND(Amount<=150000,Amount>0),9,0)

<=$150,000 is best as it provides a clearer path for Meridian to get into the account
fields.label: OPS Amount Score
fields.name: OPS_Amount_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
Annual Revenue for the Account. Brackets are defined below:

<$75M OR Between $1.5B AND $5B: +3
>=$75M AND <=$150M: +5
>$150M AND <$1.5B: +9
0 or >5B: 0
fields.label: OPS Annual Revenue Score
fields.name: OPS_Annual_Revenue_Score__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
IF(IF(DAY(TODAY()) > DAY(CloseDate),((YEAR(CloseDate) - YEAR(TODAY()) ) * 12) + (MONTH(CloseDate) - 
MONTH(TODAY())) - 1,((YEAR(CloseDate) - YEAR(TODAY()) ) * 12) + (MONTH(CloseDate) - 
MONTH(TODAY())))<=6,3,0)
fields.inlineHelpText:
<= 6 months is best as they are closing soon
> 6 months no impact
fields.label: OPS Close Date Score
fields.name: OPS_Close_Date_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
D&B Paydex < 60 is bad: -1
D&B Paydex >= 60 is good (no impact to score)
fields.label: OPS Credit Score
fields.name: OPS_Credit_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
What is the prospect likely to do at the end of the lease term?

Renewal = 25
Return = -5
Replace = -5
Upgrade = -5
Month to Month = -5
Purchase = -5
fields.label: OPS End of Lease Disposition Score
fields.name: OPS_End_of_Lease_Disposition_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The prior value of the OPS Score
fields.label: OPS History

fields.inlineHelpText:
Is the Account Leasing from a Preferred Secured Party?

NOT Leasing From a Preferred Secured Party = +3
Leasing From a Preferred Secured Party = +9
fields.label: OPS Preferred Secured Party Score
fields.name: OPS_Preferred_Secured_Party_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
The more recent the filings on the account, the higher the score

37-60+ months = -1
13-36 months = +5
0-12 months = +9
No Filings = 0
fields.label: OPS Recency of Filings Score
fields.name: OPS_Recency_of_Filings_Score__c

fields.calculatedFormula: OPS_Amount_Score__c + OPS_Annual_Revenue_Score__c  + OPS_Credit_Score__c  + OPS_Years_in_Business_Score__c  + OPS_Transaction_Type_Score__c  + OPS_Close_Date_Score__c  + OPS_Stage_Score__c  + OPS_Total_UCC_Filings_Scoreq__c  + OPS_Preferred_Secured_Party_Score__c  + OPS_Recency_of_Filings_Score__c  + OPS_End_of_Lease_Disposition_Score__c
fields.inlineHelpText: This score is based on the Opportunity Amount, Annual Revenue, Credit Score, Years in Business, Transaction Type, Close Date, Opportunity Stage, Total UCC Filings, Leasing from a Preferred Secured Party?, Recency of Filings, and Likelihood to renew.
fields.label: OPS Score
fields.name: OPS_Score__c

fields.calculatedFormula: CASE( StageName , "Nurture", 0, "Identified", 3,"Request for Quote", 5,"Budgetary Quote", 5,"Quote Created", 5,"Quote Rejected", 5,"Quote Approved", 5,"Proposal", 5,"Conditional Agreement (90%)", 9,0)
fields.inlineHelpText:
The further the stage, the higher the score

Stage = Score
Nurture = 0
Identified = 3
Request for Quote = 5
Budgetary Quote = 5
Quote Created = 5
Quote Rejected = 5
Quote Approved = 5
Proposal = 5
Conditional Agreement = 9
fields.label: OPS Stage Score
fields.name: OPS_Stage_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
The number of UCC filings for the Account determines the score:

< 5 is bad: -1
>=5 and <25 is average: +5
>= 25 is best: +9
fields.label: OPS Total UCC Filings Score
fields.name: OPS_Total_UCC_Filings_Scoreq__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
FMV is preferred

FMV: 9
FMV Capped:3
All others: 0
fields.label: OPS Transaction Type Score
fields.name: OPS_Transaction_Type_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
The longer a company is in business, the more stable/creditworthy they are likely to be

>=50 years: 9
<50 years: 0
fields.label: OPS Years in Business Score
fields.name: OPS_Years_in_Business_Score__c

fields.label: Bill To On Credit Hold
fields.name: crm_Bill_To_On_Credit_Hold__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
IF(
   NOT(ISPICKVAL(crm_Finance_Dept_Decision__c,"")),
   TEXT(crm_Finance_Dept_Decision__c),
   IF(
      OR(
         crm_Credit_Review__c = 'Not Required',
         crm_Credit_Review__c = 'Credit Hold'
      ),
      "Not Required",
      IF(
         AND(
             crm_Credit_Review__c = 'New Account',
             crm_Bill_To_On_Credit_Hold__c = False,
             Account.RecordType.Name = 'Customers'
             ),
      "Credit Limit Set",
      IF(
         AND(
             crm_Credit_Review__c = 'Required',
             CloseDate - TODAY() > 15
         ),
         "To Be Reviewed",
         IF(
            OR(
               AND(
                   crm_Credit_Review__c = 'Required',
                   CloseDate - TODAY() <= 15,
                   OR(
                      ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Propose'),
                      ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Negotiate'),
                      ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Verbal Commit')
                   )
               ),
               AND(
                   crm_Credit_Review__c = 'New Account',
                    CloseDate - TODAY() <= 30,
                    crm_Bill_To_On_Credit_Hold__c = True,
                   OR(
                      ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Propose'),
                      ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Negotiate'),
                      ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Verbal Commit')
                   )
               )
            ),
            "In Review",
            "To Be Reviewed"
         )
      )
      )
   )
)
fields.inlineHelpText:
Not Required: Opportunity can turn into an order if won.
To Be Reviewed: Opportunity is not yet on finance's dashboard because it not expected to close in the next 15 days.
In Review: Opportunity is expected to close within 15 days AND stage is propose, negotiate, or verbal commit.  It is on finance's dashboard to determine creditworthiness.
Required - New Account: On finance's dashboard as the opportunity for a MITUS Prospect is expected to close within 30 days
fields.label: Credit Review Status
fields.name: crm_Credit_Review_Status__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
IF(
   OR(
       Account.RecordType.Name <> 'Customers',
       AND(
           Account.RecordType.Name = 'Customers',
           crm_Credit_Review_Revenue__c < 100000,
           crm_Epicor_Customer_Type__c <> 'CUS'
       )
   ),
   "New Account",
   IF(
      AND(
          crm_Credit_Review_Revenue__c >= 100000,
          Account.RecordType.Name = 'Customers'
      ),
      "Required",
      IF(
         AND(
             crm_Credit_Review_Revenue__c < 100000,
             crm_Bill_To_On_Credit_Hold__c = True
         ),
         "Credit Hold",
         "Not Required"
      )
   )
)
fields.label: Credit Review
fields.name: crm_Credit_Review__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ1_Is_a_bid_bond_required__c, "Yes"), -5, 0) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ2_When_is_the_bid_due__c, "0 - 10 Days"), -15,
   IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ2_When_is_the_bid_due__c, "11 - 14 Days"), -10,
      IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ2_When_is_the_bid_due__c, "15 Days - 1 Month"), -5, 0
      )
   )
) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ3_Whose_T_Cs_are_to_be_used__c, "Client's T&Cs to be used"), 0, 10) + 
IF(
   AND(
       ISPICKVAL(rfpQ4_Is_this_a_current_active_client__c, "Yes"),
       Account.RecordType.Name = "Customers",
       ISPICKVAL(Account.Epicor_Customer_Type__c, "CUS")
   ), 5, -5
) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ5_How_did_MIT_shape_the_RFP__c, "MIT did not write the RFP"), 0,
   IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ5_How_did_MIT_shape_the_RFP__c, "MIT consulted with the partner on the RFP"), 5, 15
   )
) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ6a_Do_we_have_vendor_support__c, "Yes"), 15, -10) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ6b_Did_we_receive_Deal_Reg_Special_P__c , "Yes"), 10, 0) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ7a2_Tier__c, "Tier 1"), 15, 
   IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ7a2_Tier__c, "Tier 2"), 5, 0
   )
) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ7b_Are_references_required__c, "Yes, multiple"), 0,
   IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ7b_Are_references_required__c, "Yes, one"), 5, 15
   )
) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ8a_100_fulfilled_by_MIT_Resource__c, "100% MIT resources"), 5, 0) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ9a_Is_this_an_E_RATE_quote__c, "Yes"), -15, 0) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ9b_Is_it_going_out_for_bid__c, "Yes"), -15, 0) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ9c_Has_a_470_been_released__c, "Yes"), 0, -15) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ9d_Other_business_available__c, "Yes"), 5, 0) +
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ10c_Strict_pricing_requirements__c, "Yes"), -5, 0) +
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ10d_Is_there_a_funding_out_clause__c, "Yes"), -15, 0) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ11_Do_we_have_relationship__c, "Yes"), 10, 0) + 
IF(ISPICKVAL(rfpQ12_Has_MIT_influenced_content_of_RFP__c, "Yes"), 15, 0)

fields.inlineHelpText:
This field is leveraged as a way for Sales Support to update the ForecastCategory field independently of the Stage value.
Typically, only the Opportunity.Owner can do that.
This field triggers the update in the flow "Opportunity: Automations After Save".
This field shouldn't be used for reporting.
fields.label: CRM Forecast Category
fields.name: crm_CRM_Forecast_Category__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
IF(
   crm_Quote_Cost__c > 0,
   crm_Quote_Cost__c,
   IF(
      crm_Total_Business_Forecast_Cost__c > 0,
      crm_Total_Business_Forecast_Cost__c,
      0
   )
)
fields.label: AM Forecast Cost
fields.name: crm_AM_Forecast_Cost__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
IF( 
   AND(
       crm_AM_Forecast_Cost__c = 0,
       crm_AM_Forecast_Rev__c = 0
   ),
   0,
   crm_AM_Forecast_GPM__c / crm_AM_Forecast_Rev__c
)

IF(
    ISBLANK(crm_mP_Rev_Rec_Date__c),"",
    IF(
        MONTH(crm_mP_Rev_Rec_Date__c) >= 4,
        TEXT(YEAR(crm_mP_Rev_Rec_Date__c) + 1) & '-Q' & TEXT(FLOOR((MONTH(crm_mP_Rev_Rec_Date__c) - 4) / 3) + 1),
        TEXT(YEAR(crm_mP_Rev_Rec_Date__c)) & '-Q4'
    )
)

fields.inlineHelpText: Copy/Paste to Folder Explorer for quick access to folder from your desktop
fields.label: Egnyte Share Path
fields.name: Egnyte_Share_Path_Opportunity__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
IF(
    TEXT(Egnyte_Path_Override__c) == "Manual Override",
    SUBSTITUTE(
        RIGHT(
            Egnyte_Manual_File_Path__c,
            LEN(Egnyte_Manual_File_Path__c) - (FIND("\\Shared\\", Egnyte_Manual_File_Path__c) + 7)
        ),
        "\\",
        "/"
    ),
    IF(
        TEXT(Egnyte_Path_Override__c) == "Lost",
        Account.Egnyte_Account_Folder_Path__c + '/' + SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(Account.Name, ":", ""), "/", "") + '/Opportunities/Lost',
        Account.Egnyte_Account_Folder_Path__c + '/' + SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(Account.Name, ":", ""), "/", "") + '/Opportunities' +
        IF(
            TEXT(Egnyte_Path_Override__c) == "Required",
            '/' + crm_Parent_Opportunity__r.Egnyte_Opportunity_Folder_Name__c,
            ''
        )
    )
)
